title: Providing amounts for the expenses of the Committee on Natural Resources in the One Hundred Nineteenth Congress.
plain_summary: This bill gives money to the House Committee on Natural Resources to pay for their work during the 119th Congress. The committee gets up to $19,311,600 total to cover their expenses. This money will be split equally between two years. The committee must follow House rules when they spend this money and get proper approval first.
last_action_text: Referred to the House Committee on House Administration.

sections.title: Section 1  Amounts for Committee Expenses
sections.text: The Committee on Natural Resources will receive money to pay for its operating costs during the One Hundred Nineteenth Congress. This includes paying all staff salaries and other expenses. The total amount cannot be more than nineteen million three hundred eleven thousand six hundred dollars. This money will come from the House of Representatives accounts that are set aside for committee salaries and expenses.

sections.title: Section 2  Session Limitations
sections.text: The money mentioned in Section 1 will be split into two equal parts. The first part cannot be more than nine million six hundred fifty five thousand eight hundred dollars. This amount can be used for expenses that happen between noon on January third two thousand twenty five and noon on January third two thousand twenty six. The second part is also nine million six hundred fifty five thousand eight hundred dollars. This amount can be used for expenses that happen between noon on January third two thousand twenty six and noon on January third two thousand twenty seven.

sections.title: Section 3  Vouchers
sections.text: Before any money can be paid out under this resolution, proper paperwork must be completed. The Committee must authorize the payment with a voucher (a document that shows what the money is for). The Chairman of the Committee must sign this voucher. The Committee on House Administration must also approve the payment in whatever way they require.

sections.title: Section 4  Regulations
sections.text: All money given under this resolution must be spent according to the rules set by the Committee on House Administration. The Committee on Natural Resources must follow these rules when spending their budget.
